DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MIELEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARTHA EMILY GARCIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MARTHA GARCIA ON 1/12/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, MARTHA EMILY $303.69 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $418.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESNTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
